findings.title: Weak JWT accepted: unsigned JWT (alg: none) at http://127.0.0.1:8001/
findings.description: The endpoint accepted unsigned JWT (alg: none). This indicates weak token validation that could allow authentication bypass.
findings.remediation: Validate JWT signatures, algorithm, expiration. Reject 'none' algorithm. Enforce signature verification.

evidence.response_body:
STRYX Mock Vulnerable Application

This app is for testing STRYX DAST scanner.

  • Search (reflected input)
  • Login

findings.title: IDOR: ID substitution 1 -> 2
findings.description: Changing the resource ID from 1 to 2 returned the same response, indicating Insecure Direct Object Reference.
findings.remediation: Implement proper authorization checks for resource access.

findings.title: Horizontal privilege escalation: user 2 accessed user 1's resource
findings.description: User 2 was able to access resources belonging to user 1.
findings.remediation: Verify resource ownership before granting access.

findings.title: NoSQL Injection in request body
findings.description: Injectable payload in request body caused a detectable response indicating NoSQL Injection.
findings.remediation: Sanitize and validate all user input. Use parameterized queries.

findings.title: Fuzzing issue in multipart upload: test.txt
findings.description: Multipart upload with filename 'test.txt' caused an unexpected response.
findings.remediation: Validate and sanitize file uploads.

evidence.request_body:
------WebKitFormBoundary7MA4YWxkTrZu0gW
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="test.txt"
Content-Type: application/octet-stream

<script>alert(1)</script>
------WebKitFormBoundary7MA4YWxkTrZu0gW--
